hero.subtitle: The smart CV builder that analyzes Job Descriptions, writes personalized Cover Letters, and generates professional PDFs in seconds.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Equipped with everything you need to catch the recruiter's eye.
features.f1Desc: Our AI automatically extracts keywords and skills from the Job Description, ensuring your CV passes ATS screenings effortlessly.
features.f2Desc: Generate highly personalized Cover Letters tailored specifically to your experience and the job's requirements.
features.f3Desc: Export PDFs with clean, standard layouts designed to maximize your success rate with recruitment software.
features.f4Desc: Skip hours of formatting. Get a complete, professional application package with just a few clicks.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get a professional CV in 3 simple steps.
howItWorks.s1Desc: Provide your work experience and paste the Job Description.
howItWorks.s2Desc: Our AI system automatically tweaks and highlights the skills that best match the job requirements.
howItWorks.s3Desc: Instantly receive your ATS-friendly CV and Cover Letter, ready to be sent to recruiters.

footer.description: The automated CV builder that helps you conquer any recruiter with ease.
